title: Amendment 001 — CSV Upload como fuente de datos de primera clase
summary: Locked amendment elevating CSV upload from a Dropi fallback to a first-class, channel-agnostic data source with immutable raw history and a generic CSVConnector.
notes: Manifest declared type=ADR with precedence 0; document self-declares Estado: LOCKED and Decisor: Nicolás. Treated as an Accepted ADR amending docs/PRD.md.
